member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadArg_MoreTime_MaximumTime
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Requesting more time, maximum time is less than additional time.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_Account
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /account=type, where type must be one of 'User', 'LocalService', 'LocalSystem', or 'NetworkService'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_ConfigFile
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /configFile= argument must consist of characters for a file name, problem a position {0} with character '{1}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_DataSource
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /dataSource= argument must consist of characters for a directory path, problem a position {0} with character '{1}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_EnvironmentName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /environmentName=environmentId, required argument is missing or empty.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_InstanceName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /instanceName= argument must consist only of alpha-numeric characters, problem a postition {0} with character '{1}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_ServiceDependsOn
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /serviceDependsOn=serviceName argument, '{0}' service does not appear to be installed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.BadInstallUtilArg_ServiceStartMode
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to /serviceStartMode=mode, where mode must be one of 'Automatic', 'DelayedStart', 'Manual', or 'Disabled'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.ConfigFile_InvalidCharacter
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to configFile '{0}', must consist only of characters that are valid as part of a file name, problem a position {1} with character '{2}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.ConfigFile_Missing
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to configFile cannot be empty or missing.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.DataSource_InvalidCharacter
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to dataSource '{0}', must consist only of alpha-numeric characters, problem a position {1} with character '{2}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.DataSource_Missing
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to dataSource cannot be empty or missing.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.DataSource_MustBeFileBased
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DataSource is required to be file based..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.EnvironmentName_InvalidCharacter
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to environmentName '{0}', must consist only of alpha-numeric characters, problem a position {1} with character '{2}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.EnvironmentName_Missing
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to environmentName cannot be empty or missing.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.EnvironmentName_TooLong
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to environmentName '{0}', length must not exceed {1} characters.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.FileName_InvalidCharacter
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to '{0}', must consist only of valid file system characters, problem a position {1} with character '{2}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.FullEnvironmentName_DuplicateFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Combined environment name plus optional instance name, '{0}' already installed as version {1}.{2}.{3:D2}.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.FullEnvironmentName_TooLong
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Combined environment name plus optional instance name, '{0}' length must not exceed {1} characters.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to instanceName '{0}', must consist only of alpha-numeric characters, problem a position {1} with character '{2}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.InstanceName_TooLong
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to instanceName '{0}', length must not exceed {1} characters.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobDatabaseServerCommandLineJadeUsage
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Usage: JoobDatabaseServer.exe [<options>]
Options: /help|/?|-h|-? Display this usage message, and exit /console Run as console rather than service /connectionStringName=connectionName Explicit selection of a connectionString by name.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobDatabaseServerCommandLineUsage
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Usage: JoobDatabaseServer.exe [<options>]
Options: /help|/?|-h|-? Display this usage message, and exit /console Run as console rather than service /environmentName=EnvironmentId Name used to group all services that work together as a single environment /instanceName=InstanceName Name used to differentiate multiple instances of the same service for an environment on the same machine /connectionStringName=connectionName Explic [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobDatabaseServerConsolePressControlC
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to JOOB Database Server started: Press Control-C to exit:.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobDatabaseServerConsoleTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to JOOB Database Server for environment '{0}'.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobDatabaseServerNTServiceDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} service to provide remote database access for environment ({1}).

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobDatabaseServerNTServiceDisplayName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Database Service ({1}).

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobGlobalServerNTServiceDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} service to provide discovery web services for all environments.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobGlobalServerNTServiceDisplayName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Discovery Service.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.JoobManagementServerCommandLineUsage
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Usage: JoobManagementServer.exe [<options>]
Options: /help|/?|-h|-? Display this usage message, and exit
/console Run as console rather than service /environmentName=EnvironmentId Name used to group all services that work together as a single environment /instanceName=InstanceName Name used to differentiate multiple instances of the same service for an environment on the same machine [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Exception occurred while handling '{0}', Exception details:\r\n{1}.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.MoreTimeException
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' encountered a problem when requesting a further {1} seconds to get service into {2} state\r\n{3}.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.MoreTimeForStart
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' requesting a further {1} seconds to allow service to start.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.MoreTimeForState
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' requesting a further {1} seconds to allow service to enter {2} state.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' requesting a further {1} seconds to allow service to stop.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.InternalsMessages.MoreTimeTimedOut
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' exceeded internal timeout limit of {1} seconds trying to enter {2} state.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to option is required.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' encountered SignOn disabled exception, on attempt #{1} for environmentId '{2}'..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Windows Service Name '{0}' length must not exceed {1} characters.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' is handling custom command({1}) request.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Service '{0}' terminated due to timeout exceeded on stop request.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent
member.summary: A proxy object for a Jade process.
member.remarks: Each supports a Jade Database logon, .NET to Jade DB object mapping and general Jade Process support functionality, such as transaction management and notification handling. Only one thread can at most can be associated with one 'active' Jade process at any one time.

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.CreateInstance``1(JadeSoftware.Joob.ClassPersistence)
member.summary: Create a JOM object, and its associated .NET object

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.CreateInstance(System.UInt32,JadeSoftware.Joob.ClassPersistence)
member.summary: Create a JOM object, but no associated .NET object

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.CreateObject``1(System.UInt32,JadeSoftware.Joob.ClassPersistence)
member.summary: Create a JOM object, and its associated .NET object

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.CreateObject(JadeSoftware.Joob.Interop.DskObjectId)
member.summary: Give a JOM objectId, create a .NET proxy object. The actual type of the .NET proxy object depends on the JOM objectId provided

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.CreateObject``1(JadeSoftware.Joob.Interop.DskObjectId)
member.summary: Give a JOM objectId, create a .NET proxy object. The type of the .NET proxy object returned is controlled by the T parameter, but the created .NET object be dependant on the JOM objectId provided

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.DeleteInstance(JadeSoftware.Joob.Interop.DskObjectId)
member.summary: Delete the JOM object based on the objectId parameter

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.GetTypeFromObjectId(JadeSoftware.Joob.Interop.DskObjectId,System.Type)
member.summary: Will fall back to the object resolver if it hasn't encountered the class id in the oid as yet
member.param: the oid
JoobObject types

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.RequestSessionRestart(JadeSoftware.Joob.ObjectId)
member.summary: If the object exists and it is a JOM process, then send a notification to its node asking the node to sign-off the process, and sign-on a new process. This will ensure that any class agents that the process has open are closed.
member.param: An objectId that represents a see "JadeSoftware.Joob.Management.JoobSession"/> (aka JOM Process)
member.returns: true if the object exists and the notification was send, otherwise false

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomProcessAgent.RequestSessionDetails(JadeSoftware.Joob.ObjectId,JadeSoftware.Joob.ObjectId@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Retrieve some details about the for the purposes of logging
member.param: An objectId that represents a see "JadeSoftware.Joob.Management.JoobSession"/> (aka JOM Process)
The representing the owner of the object
The operating system process id for the process hosting the JOOB node
member.returns: true if the object exists and the necessary details where retrieved, otherwise false

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.ValidateEnvironmentName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Verify that environment name follows required rules
Must not be null or white space
Length less than 50
Contains only letters and digits
member.param: User supplied environment name
Optional user supplied instance name
member.exception: If environment name is null or whitespace
When validation rules are not met

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.ValidateInstanceName(System.String)
member.summary:
Verify that instance name follows required rules
Length less than 50
Contains only letters and digits
member.param: Optional user supplied instance name
member.exception: When validation rules are not met

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.MakeValidatedFullEnvironmentId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Combine and in a consistent way Also perform any necessary validation on the parameters
member.param: Environment name, expected to have been validated via
Optional instance name, expected to have been validated via
member.returns: A validated and fully qualified environment id

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.CheckForDuplicateEnvironmentId(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that the only exists within the current installation
member.param: Combined environment name plus optional instance name

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.ValidateDataSource(System.String)
member.summary:
Verify that the data source follows required rules
For a path, only valid characters for file and directory names
member.param: Data source
member.exception: When validation rules are not met

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.ValidateConfigFilename(System.String)
member.summary:
Verify that the configuration file follows required rules
For a path, only valid characters for file and directory names
member.param: Data source
member.exception: When validation rules are not met

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.ValidateServiceName(System.String)
member.summary:
Verify that the full Windows Service Name meets necessary validation rules
Value must not be null or white space
The service name is too long
For a path, only valid characters for file and directory names
member.param: Full Windows Service name
member.exception: When validation rules are not met

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Helpers.MakeFullEnvironmentId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Combine and in a consistent way
member.param: Environment name, expected to have been validated via
Optional instance name, expected to have been validated via

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomNodeAgent
member.summary: Only one instance of JoobNode exists in this application. This instance initializes a connection to the Jade Database

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JomNodeAgent.GetKnownTypes(System.Runtime.Serialization.DataContractSerializer)
T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobObjectActivator
member.summary: The JoobObjectActivator class provides an efficient way of creating JoobObjects based on their Type. It uses DynamicMethods to create and maintain an appropriate constructor delegate for maximum creation performance

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobObjectActivator.CreateInstance(System.Type,JadeSoftware.Joob.ClassPersistence)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the Type t.
member.param: The instance type which must be a type of JoobObject.
The lifetime.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransactionManager
member.summary: Manages an overall transaction. Each time BeginTransaction is called (for a given transaction) the returned JoobTransaction object is added under the management of this class. When the Commit/Rollback nested level reaches 0 the manager is has finished - and a new one will be created for the next transaction (if required) A Rollback in a nested situation will rollback immediately. Any subsequent Rollbacks will be OK, any subsequent Commits will fail with a TransactionAbortedException

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction
member.summary: An individual Transaction vote - with the actual transaction is managed by the JoobTransactionManager

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.#ctor(JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransactionManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The manager.

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.Commit
member.summary: Commits the database transaction.
member.exception: An error occurred while trying to commit the transaction.
The transaction has already been committed or rolled back.-or- The connection is broken.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.Connection
member.summary: Specifies the Connection object to associate with the transaction.
member.returns: The Connection object to associate with the transaction.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.IsolationLevel
member.summary: Specifies the for this transaction.
member.returns: The for this transaction. The default is ReadCommitted.

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.Rollback
member.summary: Rolls back a transaction from a pending state.
member.exception: An error occurred while trying to commit the transaction.
The transaction has already been committed or rolled back.-or- The connection is broken.

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.JoobTransaction.Finalize
member.summary: Releases unmanaged resources and performs other cleanup operations before the is reclaimed by garbage collection.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.MetadataDesc`1
member.summary: Caches the meta data for the type provided Different database instances yield different results even for the same schema If the connection is null then the connection on the current thread will be used.

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.MetadataDesc`1.GetData(JadeSoftware.Joob.Client.IJoobConnection)
member.summary: Gets an instance of the Metadata Type.
member.param: The connection.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.SecureStringExtensions
member.summary: SecureString Extensions

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.ProcessAgentPool.ReplaceAgent(JadeSoftware.Joob.ObjectId)
member.summary: Try and find a process agent with a matching oid, if found Dispose of agent (SignOff) and replace it with a new one. Purpose is to replace process agent(s) that have classes open that are stopping a re-organization/transition from occurring.
member.param: The ObjectId of Process Agent object SignOff
member.returns: True if matching process agent was found and replaced, false otherwise

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessExitedEventArgs
member.summary: EventArgs that contain information about the process that exiting process

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessExitedEventArgs.ExitCode
member.summary: Return the ExitCode of the just exited process

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessOutputEventArgs
member.summary: The event args that contains information about the line of text written to either stdout or stderr on the created process.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessOutputEventArgs.Data
member.summary: Returns the line of text written to stdout or stderr

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessOutputEventArgs.Error
member.summary: Returns true if the line of text was written to stder

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher
member.summary: Launch a process with the standard error/out/in all mapped. Subscribe to the OutputReceived event prior to start/run to listen to the program output, write to StandardInput for input.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: The working directory that the process is to execute from

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.ArgumentString
member.summary: Return command line arguments as a string

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.StandardInput
member.summary: To support writes to stdin

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.IsRunning
member.summary: Return true if this instance is running a process

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.ExitCode
member.summary: Wait for the process to exit and return the exit code

member.name: E:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.OutputReceived
member.summary: Notify subscribers of writes to stdout or stderr

member.name: E:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.ProcessExited
member.summary: Notifies subscribers when the process exits

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Construct a ProcessLauncher that does not require any command line arguments
member.param: Relative or absolute name of the executable to launch

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.#ctor(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Construct a ProcessLauncher that takes command line arguments
member.param: Relative or absolute name of the executable to launch
Command line arguments as a string array

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Construct a ProcessLauncher that takes command line arguments
member.param: Relative or absolute name of the executable to launch
Command line arguments in string string argument format

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.Run
member.summary: Run the process synchronously and return the exit code

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.Start
member.summary: Start the process asynchronously and return

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.CloseMainWindow
member.summary: Closes a process that has a user interface by sending a close message to its main window.
member.returns: true if the close message was successfully sent; false if the associated process does not have a main window or if the main window is disabled (for example if a modal dialog is being shown).

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.Kill
member.summary: Kills the process if it is still running

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.WaitForExit
member.summary: Wait indefinitely for the process to exit

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.WaitForExit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Close stdin and wait for the process to exit, return false if the process did not exit within timeout (milliseconds) period

member.name: M:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.ProcessLauncher.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.RegisteredInstallation
member.summary: Wrapper across the Windows Registry values related to a single JOOB executables/binaries installation

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.RegisteredSoftware
member.summary: Wrapper across the Windows Registry values for a given computer

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Internals.Utility.RegisteredEnvironment
member.summary: Wrapper across the Windows Registry values related to a single JOOB environment
